creator: sylvain@sylvaingarrigues.com
text:
When I enter the jail interactively (poudriere testport -j rpi2 -vv -i -o misc/help2man ), a lot of commands segfault, including pkg or make:

root@rpi2-default:~ # pkg
qemu: uncaught target signal 11 (Segmentation fault) - core dumped
Segmentation fault
root@rpi2-default:~ # gmake-lite 
qemu: uncaught target signal 11 (Segmentation fault) - core dumped
Segmentation fault
root@rpi2-default:~ # perl -e 'print "Hello World";'
Hello Worldroot@rpi2-default:~ # 
root@rpi2-default:~ # make
make: no target to make.

make: stopped in /root
root@rpi2-default:~ # 

I have the "core dumped" files if that would help.
